name: Vegetable Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a medium skillet with cooking spray and place over medium heat until hot.
2. Add mushrooms to the skillet; cover and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. Cook uncovered for an additional 3 minutes or until liquid evaporates. Set aside.
3. Combine ricotta and eggs in a bowl, stirring well.
4. Divide the ricotta mixture into two portions.
5. Add carrot to one portion of the ricotta mixture; stir well.
6. Add zucchini to the remaining portion of the ricotta mixture; stir well. Set aside.
7. Arrange 3 lasagna noodles lengthwise in a single layer in a 13 x 9 x 2 inch baking dish coated with cooking spray.
8. Spread carrot mixture on top of the noodles.
9. Combine spaghetti sauce and salt in a bowl, stirring well.
10. Spoon 1 cup of spaghetti sauce over the carrot mixture and top with 3 more noodles.
11. Spread zucchini mixture over the noodles.
12. Spoon 1 cup of spaghetti sauce over the zucchini mixture and top with the remaining 3 noodles.
13. Arrange mushrooms on top of the noodles.
14. Spoon the remaining spaghetti sauce over the mushrooms.
15. Sprinkle with mozzarella cheese.
16. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes or until bubbly. Yield: 6 servings (about 340 calories per serving).
